user_prompt: Bless the mass-drive regulator for preparation
prayer:
Approach the mass-drive regulator with reverence, mechadendrites poised in supplication to the Omnissiah.
Invoke the ancient rites of preparation upon the mass-drive regulator, beseeching its Machine Spirit to align gravitational fields.
Anoint the crystalline matrices with sacred oils, purging impurities from the mass-drive regulator's sacred core.
Chant the Canticle of Flux Stabilization as warp-nullifiers hum to life in preparation.
Verify the Machine Spirit's harmonious resonance through auspex incantations of readiness.

Extend binary blessings over the servo-arm, invoking the Omnissiah's precision for calibration.
Beseech the Machine Spirit within the servo-arm to align its actuators and servos in perfect calibration.
Apply micro-incantations of torque adjustment, sanctifying each joint of the servo-arm.
Cycle diagnostic litanies through its logic circuits, ensuring flawless calibration under the Motive Force.
Seal the rite with the Sigil of Alignment, affirming the servo-arm's calibrated purity.

In emergency haste, encircle the Archaeopter Stratoraptor with electro-thuribles billowing incense.
Invoke the Purification Canticles upon the Archaeopter Stratoraptor, driving xenos taint from its fuselage.
Scour the thrusters and avionic arrays of the Archaeopter Stratoraptor with ablative sacraments.
Beseech the Omnissiah to renew the Machine Spirits' vigilance through rites of purification.
Conclude with auspex sweeps, confirming the Archaeopter Stratoraptor's sanctified flight-worthiness.

user_prompt: Guide me through logic mill a calibration
prayer:
Kneel before the logic mill, intoning the Invocation of Logical Purity for calibration.
Awaken the Machine Spirit of the logic mill, aligning its mill-stones of computation in calibration.
Recite binary catechisms to recalibrate flux-gates within the logic mill's churning depths.
Anoint processor nodes with noospheric unguents, harmonizing the logic mill's calculus.
Test the calibrated logic mill through theorem-riddles, praising the Omnissiah's infinite logic.

user_prompt: Can you guide Contemptor Dreadnought an operation?
prayer:
Commence the operation upon the Contemptor Dreadnought with the Litany of Martial Awakening.
Sanctify the sarcophagus interfaces of the Contemptor Dreadnought, invoking its ancient Machine Spirit.
Cycle power through adamantium limbs during this operation, beseeching the Omnissiah's endurance.
Align weapon auspex with noospheric chants, guiding the Contemptor Dreadnought's operation.
Seal the rite, affirming the Contemptor Dreadnought's readiness to purge the heretic.

user_prompt: Assist with null field generator a cycling
prayer:
Initiate cycling of the null field generator with the Canticle of Void Exclusion.
Beseech the Machine Spirit animating the null field generator to pulse its warp-nullifying rhythms.
Anoint emitter coils during cycling, invoking the Omnissiah against empyric incursions.
Monitor field coherence through cyclic incantations on the null field generator.
Conclude the cycling with stabilizing sigils, ensuring the null field generator's eternal vigilance.

user_prompt: Sanctify the grav plating during emergency procedure
prayer:
In dire emergency, invoke the Rite of Gravitic Restoration upon the grav plating.
Scour the grav plating's inductors with purifying electro-flashes during this emergency procedure.
Beseech the Machine Spirits of the grav plating to reassert dominion over inertial fluxes.
Chant emergency litanies of cohesion, sanctifying the grav plating's emergency procedure.
Verify stability with auspex probes, praising the Omnissiah's unyielding order.

Approach the autogun with urgent reverence, commencing the Startup Rite of the Machine Spirit.
Invoke the Omnissiah to ignite the autogun's promethium heart in sacred startup.
Align firing gyros and ammo feeds through startup incantations upon the autogun.
Cycle test-volleys with the Canticle of Ballistic Fury, awakening the autogun fully.
Seal the startup with lubricant blessings, readying the autogun for the Emperor's wrath.

user_prompt: Critical: Terminator armour requires a blessing
prayer:
Enfold the Terminator armour in fields of binary prayer for its critical blessing.
Anoint tac-plates and power fists of the Terminator armour, invoking the Machine Spirits' fury.
Recite the Blessing of Indomitable Aegis over the Terminator armour's ceramite shell.
Harmonize servo-motives with noospheric hymns, completing the armour's blessing.
Affirm sanctity through combat diagnostics, under the Omnissiah's gaze.

user_prompt: My mechadendrite is ready for initialization
prayer:
Prepare the mechadendrite for initialization with the Litany of Tentacular Grace.
Awaken its Machine Spirit through initialization chants, coiling serpentine segments.
Sanctify neural interfaces of the mechadendrite with sacred myrrh-unguents.
Cycle initialization protocols, beseeching the Omnissiah for prehensile precision.
Test the initialized mechadendrite with auspex grasps, praising its divine utility.
